name: Koraidon
description: A prehistoric entity of fierce primordial power. Its brute strength is augmented by raw solar vibrations channeled through its scales.
originLore: Koraidon is a prehistoric fighting-dragon whose scales drink solar vibration. Orichalcum Pulse turns daylight into raw kinetic supremacy.

lore.celestialConcordance: Under open sun, Koraidon's orichalcum heart hammers the arena into a furnace of ancient strength.

quantumResonators.name: Collision Course
quantumResonators.description: Converts sprint momentum into a crushing impact.

quantumResonators.name: Orichalcum Pulse
quantumResonators.description: Ignites Sunlit Terrain and amplifies physical output.
